notes: Custom test.sh with 2 inner F2P gates (showSelector done() restores focus AND calls requestRender; behavioral simulation of done() closure with fake ui/editor that asserts addChild + requestRender are invoked) plus 2 upstream F2P gates (paddingX?: number property syntax check, requestRender in showSelector done closure) at weight 0.20 each, plus a P2P_REGRESSION on the editor test suite (informational only, not zeroing). Score formula uses correct weighted-replace shape (existing*inner_weight + sum(passed_weights)) with p2p_failed hard-coded False. instruction.md is the original PR review prompt, which gives the agent a specific PR URL (#791) to investigate. Ground-truth canonical patch implements editorPaddingX setting + setPaddingX dynamic update + showSelector done() requestRender call. Behavioral gates check the agent's done() closure restores focus AND triggers render, and the upstream gate cross-checks the paddingX?: property syntax in editor-component.ts. Reconstruction has 6 warnings but they all fall on directive sites (CHANGELOG positions, an interactive-mode hunk that has multiple plausible insertion points) - the load-bearing showSelector + setPaddingX edits land cleanly and the verifier checks them behaviorally rather than textually. This is the model F2P task in the cohort - keep as-is.
